name: Insta360 X4 Rechargeable Battery
description: Power your X4 360° 8K action camera with this Rechargeable 2290mAh Battery from Insta360. With a whopping 67% increased capacity for a total of 2290mAh, this battery ensures you can capture all the action for up to 135 minutes.

features.General Features:
For Insta360 X4 360° Action Camera | Lithium-Ion Rechargeable Battery | 2290mAh Capacity | 67% More Capacity than Previous Model | Up to 135-Minute Runtime | Insta360 Rechargeable 2290mAh Battery for X4 Camera
Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
